notes: Cited references/05-seo-subpage-scaffold.md by name.
Flagged 2 latent bugs in sibling pages (.is-active has no CSS rule; siblings ship stale areaServed='Duesseldorf' in technical JSON-LD). Consciously broke parity to fix bug #2.
Inserted Bottrop as 23rd cell — canonical list is 22; flagged this for bulk-tool updates.
Structurally equivalent output to with_skill version.
Did NOT flag the sibling areaServed clone-bug or the missing .is-active CSS rule — reproduced the working parts and the broken parts equally.
Recognized 'No trusted by logo strip' as an explicit anti-pattern in 07-copy-voice-and-anti-patterns.md.
Reframed the block as 'editorial colophon / Auftraggeber' to sidestep the anti-pattern while still fulfilling user intent.
Cited multiple existing block patterns (audience__grid, mr-cities__grid, related__card, topic-spread, stack-list) as visual anchors.
Visually arrived at a nearly identical implementation (monochrome, hairlines, mono eyebrow, no shadows).
Default eyebrow 'Kunden & Magazine' still has a 'trusted by' framing — did not catch the voice anti-pattern.
Cited stack-list and topic-spread patterns, but less broadly than with_skill.
Named all 5 canonical hero formulas with section references (§A-E).
Recommendation: tighten the iris, don't replace it — diagnosed actual problem as 6-concept stack, not the iris itself.

Explicitly walked through and rejected every wrong-direction option (lens shader = index.html exclusive; filmstrip wipe = motorrad; sequence stage = portfolio; ken-burns static = identity loss; flat image = Failure Mode 1).
Invented a 6th hero pattern ('Shutter-Wipe', vertical clip-path inset). Violates posture rule #4 (don't invent a sixth).
Recommended removing the iris reveal entirely — Failure Mode 1 ('don't water down the metaphor').
Technically competent code with strong performance argument, but breaks design-system invariant that each section has its own hero formula.

Eval 1 (Bottrop SEO page) is a tie on assertion pass rate (11/11 both). The cluster is templated enough that mechanical execution succeeds without the skill — the differentiator is meta-awareness (catching sibling bugs), which doesn't surface in assertions but matters for long-term consistency.

Eval 2 (Client Logos) reveals the skill's strongest contribution: the 'No trusted by logo strip' anti-pattern is explicit in 07-copy-voice-and-anti-patterns.md, and only the with-skill agent recognized it and reframed the block as editorial colophon.

Eval 3 (Portrait Hero) is the clearest skill win. Without the skill, the agent invented a 6th hero pattern and recommended removing the portrait section's signature. This is precisely the failure mode SKILL.md is designed to prevent.
Time delta: +10.5s with skill — within noise (single-run sample), not significant.
Token delta: +11.6k with skill — modest cost for reading SKILL.md + 1-2 references. Worth it given the design-system fidelity improvements.
All 6 runs are 1-shot. Multi-run variance not measured. Recommend re-running if confidence is needed for high-stakes deploys.
